name: §2.26 safety classifier --extra-blocklist extends the built-in patterns with operator-supplied terms
command: printf 'forbidden-keyword\n' > extra.txt && echo 'mentioning forbidden-keyword here' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/customer-agent-safety-classifier.sh" --agent example --extra-blocklist extra.txt 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'verdict=block' err.txt && echo extended 1>&2
